channel.title: Databery Blog
channel.description: Field notes on account & sales intelligence from Databery.

item.title: The 7 buying signals that actually predict a deal
item.description: Not all intent is created equal. The seven buying signals our analysts find reliably precede a real B2B purchase decision — and the noise to ignore.

item.title: Account research vs. a data subscription
item.description: Data tools give you fields; research gives you a point of view. Why the difference between intelligence and a data subscription shows up directly on your win-rate.

item.title: Build a target list your reps will actually work
item.description: Most target account lists die in a spreadsheet. A few simple research moves turn a TAL into something a sales team will genuinely use every day.
